title: Legal Challenges and Opportunities  in the Mining Industry Today
content:
## Legal Challenges and Opportunities  in the Mining Industry Today
In conjunction with the 2019 PDAC conference, our Global Metals and Mining Group invites you to attend a presentation on the legal challenges and opportunities affecting mining companies in Canada and abroad. The latest legal developments and practical insights will be shared by panels comprised of industry leaders and the McCarthy Tétrault Global Metals and Mining Group. This year, among other topics, the presentation will address: - Joint Ventures and Strategic Investors - Situations and Regulatory Investigations - Updates on the Latest Legal Developments in the Mining Industry
